name: canvas-grabber
description: Download your own Canvas LMS data and turn it into clean Markdown summaries of upcoming assignments and current grades.
author: Allie

scripts.sync: node --env-file-if-exists=.env auth.js && node --env-file-if-exists=.env grab.js && node --env-file-if-exists=.env parse.js && node --env-file-if-exists=.env readings.js && bash convert-canvas-slides.sh
